hr.p: Two convenient operations can be performed on this website, which is powered by Burij’s Nextcloud instance.

1. Access Virtual USB Drive: You can securely access a virtual USB drive protected by a password. If you have previously visited me and received a password for the guest WLAN, please use the same password.
2. Upload Files: If you do not know the password or have any issues, you can still send me large files by uploading them here.
